install_cmds: apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root update -q && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root install -y --no-install-recommends build-essential libosmesa6-dev libgl1-mesa-glx libglfw3 patchelf libsdl2-dev libsdl2-image-dev libsdl2-mixer-dev libsdl2-ttf-dev libfreetype6-dev libportmidi-dev && apt-get clean && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
